title: Acctim Wickford Kids Teaching Wall Clock Quartz Rainbow Dial Quarter Markers Blue 20cm 22529
features: Make Learning the Time More Fun
description: Educational and brightly coloured, the Acctim Wickford Kids Wall Clock in White is perfect for teaching the time to your little ones. Suitable for a variety of rooms including bedroom, classroom or nursery, this vibrant time teaching wall clock comes with brightly coloured number to make learning the time more fun. Complete with Quartz movement. 20cm diameter.
